meta.title: Health Polyclinic — Quality Healthcare for Your Family
meta.description: Health Polyclinic provides professional medical services with experienced doctors, convenient scheduling, and trusted care for the whole family.

hero.title: Health Polyclinic
hero.subtitle: Quality Healthcare for Your Family
hero.description: We are committed to providing professional, compassionate medical care with experienced doctors and modern facilities. Your health and well-being are our top priorities.

about.title: Why Choose Us
about.professionalDoctorsDesc: Our team consists of highly qualified doctors with years of experience in their respective fields, dedicated to providing the best care.
about.convenientSchedulingDesc: Book appointments online easily with our simple booking system. Choose a time that works best for you, anytime, anywhere.
about.trustedCareDesc: We prioritize patient safety and comfort. Our clinic follows strict medical standards to ensure you receive the highest quality care.

services.title: Our Services
services.generalConsultationDesc: Comprehensive health check-ups and medical consultations for patients of all ages.
services.internalMedicineDesc: Diagnosis and treatment of adult diseases with a focus on preventive care and long-term health management.
services.pediatricsDesc: Specialized medical care for infants, children, and adolescents in a friendly and comforting environment.
services.preventiveCareDesc: Health screenings, vaccinations, and wellness programs designed to prevent illness and promote healthy living.

doctors.title: Our Doctors
doctors.error: Unable to load doctors. Please try again later.
doctors.noDoctors: No doctors available at the moment.

map.title: Find Us
map.description: We are working on integrating an interactive map to help you find our clinic easily.

cta.title: Ready to Book an Appointment?
cta.description: Take the first step towards better health. Schedule a visit with our experienced doctors today.

footer.description: Your trusted healthcare partner. We are committed to providing professional, compassionate medical care for you and your family.
